rulings.Rulings: OFF CALENDAR PER MOVING PARTY.

rulings.Case Title: LAWSON VS A.P. GREEN INDUSTRIES, INC.
rulings.Rulings: DENY, BURDEN SHIFTED. TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT CREATED BY DECLARATION OF LAWSON. PARAGRAPHS 5 & 6 SUFFICIENT EXPLANATION TO AVOID D'AMICO OBJECTION. (JH)

rulings.Case Title: DARBY VS USA TRIATHLON
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Bifurcation Of Trial On Issue Of Express Contractual Assumption Of The Risk-Affirmative Defense
rulings.Rulings: CONTINUED TO 8-30-02 PER MOVING PARTY.

rulings.Case Title: ADKISSON VS FANAIKA
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION To Expunge Lis Pendens & For Payment Of Atty'S Fees & Costs
rulings.Rulings: MOTION TO EXPUNGE LIS PENDENS DENIED. PAYMENT SUBSTANTIAL. SEE PETERSEN VS. HARTEL 40 CAL.3D 102, 105 (1985). MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES FOR DEFENDANT OF $1,575 GRANTED. (NH(EX))

rulings.Case Title: PARK VS CALIFORNIA KOREA BANK
rulings.Rulings: SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 6 [DEFAMATION] TO PLEAD DEFAMATORY REMARKS WITH MORE PARTICULARITY. See Witkin, Cal. Procedure, Pleading, sec. 695. OVERRULE AS TO REST. COMPLAINT PROPERLY PLEADS EMPLOYMENT RELATIONSHIP. PLAINTIFF DID NOT NECESSARILY FAIL TO EXHAUST HER ADMINISTRATIVE REMEDY. VALDEZ WAS ABROGATED IN Richards v. CH2M Hill, Inc., (2001) 26 Cal.4th 798 AND WEIGHT OF FEDERAL AND STATE AUTHORITY DO NOT ENDORSE VALDEZ'S STRICT READING OF THE CLAIMS REQUIREMENT. See Saavedra v. Orange County Consolidated Transportation Service Agency, (1992) 11 Cal.App.4th 824; Martin v. Fisher, (1992) 11 Cal.App.4th 118. (PB)

rulings.Case Title: VIRGILIO GALZA CO VS CCSF
rulings.Rulings: DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT (DANGEROUS CONDITION): DENY, TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT RE (1)WHETHER CONDITION WAS DANGEROUS; (2)FORESEEABILITY OF INJURY; AND (3)DEFENDANT'S CONSTRUCTIVE NOTICE. (PB)

rulings.Case Title: VIRGILIO GALZA CO VS CCSF
rulings.Rulings: DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT (DESIGN IMMUNITY): DENY, FAILURE TO SHIFT BURDEN. FAILURE TO DEMONSTRATE THAT LACK OF ADHESIVE MATERIAL AT TOP OF THE STAIRS WAS PART OF THE DESIGN. (PB)
